description: Create a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity that runs every Thursday at 18:00. Trigger on push to ghact branch with tags v*.*.* and on pull requests to master, ignoring README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md. Configure a windows-latest job with msys2 shell to check out code, set up MinGW, cache and install libraries, cache and install Coverity scan tools, configure CMake, build with Coverity, and submit the results to Coverity using a token and email from secrets.
